intro: Spermacoce wydleriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Wydler's bee flower. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions.
